ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to adjacent LUG events
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
__TOC__ The fifth annual Lustre User Group meeting was held in stylish South Beach District of Miami Beach, Florida, April 23-25, 2007, at the beautiful [http://www.thepalmshotel.com Palms Hotel].
The Lustre User Group Conference is the premier event for learning new technical information, acquiring best practices, and sharing knowledge about Lustre Technology. It's a once-a-year opportunity for users to get answers, advice, and suggestions regarding their specific Lustre implementations. Attendees will have access to experts and peers who will share their real-world experiences. You will also be able to meet with Lustre management and developers to discuss upcoming enhancements and capabilities. Register today while space is still available!
== LUG 2007 Agenda == ===Monday April 23, 2007 === 9:00-9:30 a.m. [[Media:Lug-opening-talk.pdf|Welcome & Introduction]] Dr.Peter Braam - President & CEO
9:30-10:00 a.m. Corporate Update Kevin Canady - Vice President of Business Development
10:00-10:30 a.m. [[Media:Lug07-engineering.pdf|Engineering & QA Update]] Peter Bojanic - Vice President of Engineering
10:30-11:00 a.m. Break
11:00-12:00 p.m. [[Media:Lug07-architecture.pdf|Lustre: Architecture & Roadmap]] Dr.Peter Braam - President & CEO
12:00-1:00 p.m. Lunch
1:00-1:30 p.m. Lustre v1.6 Features & Benefits (Part I) Nathan Rutman - Principal Engineer
1:30-2:00 p.m. Lustre v1.6 Features & Benefits (Part II) Nathan Rutman - Principal Engineer
2:00-2:30 p.m. [[Media:Lug07_ornl.pdf|Lustre Center of Exellence Reports]] Shane Canon - Oak Ridge National Lab
3:00-3:30 p.m. Break
3:30-4:00 p.m. [[Media:Lug07_sun.pdf|HPC Installations]] Larry McIntosh - Sun
4:00-4:30 p.m. [[Media:Lustre_user_group_-_tacc_presentation.pdf|TACC Overview & Lustre Experiences]] Karl Schulz - TACC
4:30-5:00 p.m. [[Media:Sicortex.pdf|SiCortex and Lustre]]
6:00-7:30 p.m. Lustre Users Reception
===Tuesday April 24, 2007===
9:00-9:30 a.m. [[Media:Cealug2007.pdf|Lustre Centre of Excellence Reports: HSM]] Stephane Thiell - French Atomic Energy Commission (CEA)
9:30-10:00 a.m. Lustre Deployments Lessons Learned Steve Simms - Indiana University
10:00-10:30 a.m. Lustre Deployments Lessons Learned: Oil& Gas Industry Keith Gray - BP 10:30-11:00 a.m. Break
11:00-11:30 a.m. [[Media:Ncar_lustre.pdf|Lustre Activities]] Adam Boggs - National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR)
11:30-12:00 a.m. Lustre Tuning Tutorial Nathan Rutman - Principal Engineer
12:00-1:00 p.m. Lunch
1:00-2:00 p.m. Lustre Troubleshooting Tutorial Nathan Rutman - Principal Engineer
2:00-2:30 p.m. [[Media:Lug07-dresden.pdf|Center for Information and High Performance Computing]] Guido Juckeland - Dresden Technical University
3:00-3:30 p.m. Break
3:30-4:00 p.m. [[Media:Ddn-lug07.pdf|Storage Architecture and Roadmap]] Dave Fellinger - DDN
4:00-4:30 p.m. [[Media:Lug07-lustrenetworking.pdf|Lustre Networking: Features & Benefits]] Dr. Peter Braam
4:30-5:00 p.m. [[Media:Markgary.pdf|Lustre Centre of Excellence Reports]] Mark Gary - Lawrence Livermore National Lab
===Wednesday April 25, 2007 === 9:00-11:30 a.m. Lustre Requirements Forum
-Requirements Survey
-Prioritization
-Refinement of Specific Requirements
-Break
-Voting
-Review
11:30-12:00 a.m. Wrap-up & Thanks
We look forward to seeing you at the Palms Hotel in Miami Beach! Call 1-800-550-0505 to book rooms at the Palms. Be sure to ask for the Lustre group rate.
[[Lustre User Group 2006|<- LUG'06]] | [[Lustre User Group 2008|LUG'08 ->]]
